'''Rellias''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] ruled by the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Ganne]]. It was connected to [[Otoh Gunga/Legends|Otoh Gunga]] through the [[Rellias Straits|Rellias channel]].

==History==
During the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] [[Siege of Otoh Gunga|attacked]] the city and forced [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Ganne]] to lead him to the Rellias channel in order to prepare the attack of the underwater [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] cities.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
